public_reputation: Recognized as a leader of the roadwardens of regional weight.
appearance: Typically appears in the bright colors and tall plumes associated with Shelk’s Roadwardens.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a leader of the roadwardens still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of leader of the roadwardens in and around Roadwardens’ Central Command, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Roadwardens’ Central Command workable through the obligations of leader of the roadwardens while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around Roadwardens’ Central Command, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of leader of the roadwardens visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Captain Thalion Windrider can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Roadwardens’ Central Command.
Any task accepted from Captain Thalion Windrider may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Captain Thalion Windrider needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Roadwardens’ Central Command.
Captain Thalion Windrider needs help with a problem in Roadwardens’ Central Command that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
